name: CheckSmart
description_short: Tempe, AZ's CheckSmart at 131 E Southern Ave offers check cashing, payday loans, and money transfer services for local residents.
description_long:
CheckSmart's Tempe location at 131 E Southern Ave is a standalone check-cashing store serving the Tempe, AZ community. The store is open Monday and Friday 9AM–7PM, Tuesday through Thursday 9AM–6PM, and Saturday 10AM–4PM, with convenient access for South Tempe residents needing quick financial services.

This Tempe CheckSmart location provides check cashing, payday loans, wire transfers, and money order services. Call +1 480-966-1771 to confirm current offerings or ask about services before visiting.

When visiting this Tempe, AZ location, bring a government-issued ID and your check or identification. CheckSmart serves Tempe residents who need fast, reliable access to check cashing and short-term lending without the wait times of traditional banks.
pros: Multiple financial services available under one roof — check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill pay
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce in-store wait times
Green Dot Visa Debit Card obtainable in-store — useful for unbanked customers
Gift card exchange for cash offered in-store
Extended Friday hours (8 AM–8 PM) compared to standard days
Multiple Columbus-area locations plus regional Ohio coverage
Clear pre-visit document checklist provided on the website
cons: CheckSmart is not a direct lender — loans come from an unnamed third-party lender, so terms and rates are not controlled by CheckSmart
No loan rate, APR, or fee information disclosed on the location page
In-person only model — no indication of fully online loan applications
Ohio-only footprint limits accessibility to out-of-state residents
Shortened Sunday hours (11 AM–5 PM) may be inconvenient for some customers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Ohio residents who need in-person check cashing or money services
Consumers who need multiple financial services — cashing, bill pay, wire transfer — in a single visit
People who prefer face-to-face assistance when applying for a short-term loan
Customers looking to exchange gift cards for cash or obtain a prepaid debit card
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for Ohio residents who need a physical location for check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, or bill pay — potentially combined with a short-term loan referral. The primary caveat is that CheckSmart does not lend directly; loan terms and rates are set by an unaffiliated third party and are not disclosed upfront, so cost-conscious borrowers should ask about rates before committing.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card (in-store issuance)
meta_description: CheckSmart at 131 E Southern Ave, Tempe, AZ. Check cashing, payday loans, and money transfers.
